title: The Mystery of the Nazca Lines

scenes.text: Massive geoglyphs etched into the earth, but why?
The Nazca Lines are found in the Nazca Desert of southern Peru.
These intricate designs date back to 500 BCE and remain largely unexplained.
Were they created for the gods or as astronomical markers?
scenes.label: UNEXPLAINED PURPOSE

scenes.text: Follow if the unknown keeps you up at night.

description: 📍 Nazca Desert, Peru - 500 BCE. Massive geoglyphs etched into the earth, the Nazca Lines' true purpose remains a mystery. Were they for the gods or astronomy? Follow for daily mysteries!
